name: Pendulum
description: A wall of pendulums photographed mid-swing — every bob hangs from its own pivot and settles at a new angle per redraw.

code.style: --bob: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color1)); --rule: ( /* rod and bob share one emitted swing angle and pivot from the same point, so they stay attached */ --pa: @r(-26deg, 26deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 49%; top: 2%; width: calc(26px / @Y); height: 56%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@var(--pa)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 50%; @size: 16%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bob); transform-origin: 50% -300%; transform: rotate(@var(--pa)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
